strengths: 17 years of hands-on engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput infrastructure exceeds the 15-year minimum
Founder of GISCollective and a dense open-source portfolio (Fluent-Asserts, Trial, Vibe.dav) demonstrate a genuine builder and entrepreneurial profile
Active AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq — MCP code generators and agentic-workflow frameworks — shows current engagement with the AI tooling space
concerns: AI expertise is nascent (April 2025 onward) with no demonstrated large-scale AI products, platforms, or recognized thought leadership in the field
No evidence of director-level scope, strategic customer advisory, executive communication, or influencing product strategy at the organizational level
No advanced degree in an AI-related field; academic background is a BS in Computer Science and a fine-arts degree, not ML/AI research
response.justification: Bogdan is a technically broad and genuinely productive engineer with a legitimate full-stack and open-source record, but the role requires a recognized AI principal capable of advising strategic enterprise customers, shaping cloud/AI platform strategy, and operating at director-level influence. His titles have remained at Senior or Staff engineer throughout his career, his AI engagement is recent and limited to developer tooling rather than scaled AI products, and there is no visible record of the external thought leadership, executive advisory, or large-scale AI system ownership the position demands.
